# Indented Code Block Test

This document tests indented code blocks.

## Section One

Some text before the code block.

    func main() {
        fmt.Println("Hello")
        // This is an indented code block
        x := 1
        y := 2
        fmt.Println(x + y)
    }

More text after the code block.

## Section Two

Another section with code:

    # This is a comment, not a heading
    # Another comment
    def hello():
        return "world"

End of section.
